Prop firms are a fantastic way to practice your trading while still having skin in the game. 

Your downside risk is fixed at the cost of the evaluation and the money you make on a funded account can be withdrawn. 

We are continuing to really bulk up the educational content over on Breakout coupled with the Whiteboard series I've been putting out on YouTube. 

If you want to practice what you've been learning with us, use code MAYNE at checkout for a discount.
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
Tip from @Tradermayne: 

Stop punting long at an order block just because we traded there.

Dial down to the lower timeframes. 
If buyers aren't actually stepping in, it's not demand.

No confirmation = no trade. https://t.co/amOhoZHPfS

tweets.text: Jamie Dimon claims crypto companies that offer interest-bearing products should be subject to same capital and compliance requirements imposed on banks. That's nonsense. Banks are FDIC insured and make risky loans under a fractional reserve system. Stable coin issuers don't.
